sentence: This privacy policy applies to the camera feature of our AR Dancee mobile app.

The app depends on users' device camera to detect and analyze dance patterns of users when they are dancing. The captured dance patterns or the image of users are not saved by the app or shared with any third parties. They are used solely for the purpose of confirming that users are following the dance patterns instructed my the virtual assistant in the app.
We do not collect any personal information through the camera feature. No images or videos taken with the camera are stored on our servers or shared with any third parties.
For any questions or concerns about our privacy practices, please contact us at [ifeanyi.odenigbo@dal.ca].
